sentence_reviews.text: Hidden portions of an input are predicted from visible context; it operationally connects Self-supervised learning and Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: BERT abstract lines 37-39 describes bidirectional pretraining from unlabeled text and conditioning on left and right context.
sentence_reviews.notes: Masked-token prediction from context is supported; the explicit graph connection to token/vocabulary units is synthesized.

sentence_reviews.text: A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Self-supervised learning, Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.

sentence_reviews.text: In this atlas graph, Masked prediction objectives is modeled as depending on Self-supervised learning, Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units and feeding downstream nodes such as Large-scale pretraining, Encoder-only bidirectional transformers, Diffusion and masked-generative language models.
